name: Hamburger Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger.
2. Add the remainder of the ingredients: celery, American cheese, ripe olives, uncooked noodles, salt, onion salt, ketchup or canned tomatoes.
3. Cover tightly and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add water as needed.
